recommendations.title: 13 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @world-forge/schema, @world-forge/export-ai-rpg, @ai-rpg-engine/character-creation and 10 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.71 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 89% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 7 packages with repeated spikes
